_comment: MCP servers bundled with sevaai-sdlc-toolkit. Installing the plugin will offer to register these. Each is OPT-IN — Claude Code prompts before authenticating.

atlassian-rovo._purpose: Stages 1, 2, 5 — Jira tickets, Confluence ADRs and PRDs, compliance docs
atlassian-rovo._free_tier: Atlassian Cloud free for up to 10 users

linear._purpose: Stage 1 — issue tracker, alternative to Jira
linear._free_tier: Linear free for up to 10 users

notion._purpose: Stages 1, 2 — long-form PRDs, ADRs, knowledge base
notion._free_tier: Notion free tier covers personal use; team workspaces are paid

github._purpose: Stages 2-6 — repo structure, ADRs in repo, PRs, Actions, Dependabot, IaC
github._free_tier: GitHub Free for personal and small teams
github._install_note: Local server. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your env first.

sentry._purpose: Stage 7 — error patterns feeding the runbook
sentry._free_tier: Sentry Developer Plan: 5K errors/month, free forever

pagerduty._purpose: Stage 7 — on-call schedules, paging commands in runbook
pagerduty._free_tier: PagerDuty Developer Plan: free for individual developers

honeycomb._purpose: Stage 7 — SLO definitions grounded in real telemetry

incident-io._purpose: Stage 7 — incident management, alternative to PagerDuty

google-compute-engine._purpose: Stage 6 — read live GCE infrastructure state
google-compute-engine._required_for: stage 6 (deployment) when project runs on GCP

cloudflare-developer-platform._purpose: Stage 6 — Workers, KV, R2 state for edge-deployed projects
cloudflare-developer-platform._required_for: stage 6 (deployment) when project runs on Cloudflare

figma._purpose: Stage 2 — pull UI design context when the feature has visual design
